ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded market data */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the recorded market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in the time interval */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the time interval */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the end of the time interval */,
  "btc_volume" REAL /* Trading volume in Bitcoin (BTC) */,
  "usd_volume" REAL /* Trading volume in US Dollars (USD) */,
  "weighted_price" REAL /* Weighted average price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the time interval */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed in the time interval */,
  "liquidity_score" REAL /* Liquidity score of the market during the time interval */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average time to mine a new block */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the market data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base currency (e.g., BTC) */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quote currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate for the trading pair */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange rate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading pair (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the time interval */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the time interval */,
  "liquidity_score" REAL /* Liquidity score for the time interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded volume */,
  "btc_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume in BTC */,
  "usd_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume in USD */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades for the day */,
  "average_trade_size_btc" REAL /* Average trade size in BTC */,
  "average_trade_size_usd" REAL /* Average trade size in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
